g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does admin login and RBAC work?')
sendPrompt('What are the 5 stat cards on the admin dashboard?')
g.text: Total firms · Tickets · Pending · Approved · Team members · Recent transcripts

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does Fireflies sync work and what columns are in the transcript list?')
g.text: Fireflies → local DB every 15 min · No status column
Columns: Title · Date · Duration · Participants · [Process] · Archive (secondary)

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does archiving a transcript do?')
sendPrompt('What three fields are in the processing panel and how does it open inline?')
g.text: Processing panel — inline expansion (same page, no navigation)
1. Firm selection (required) 2. Prompt type: PM · Campaigns · Content (required)
3. Notes (optional) [Process] disabled until firm + prompt selected

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the AI do with transcript, notes and prompt?')
g.text: Transcript (local DB) + notes + prompt → structured JSON tickets

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the difference between post-processing redirect and sidebar nav to firms?')
g.text: Firm detail page · Lands on newly generated tickets · Not same as sidebar nav

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What four fields does the draft ticket card show and why is there no assignee?')
g.text: Title · Type badge (task / design / dev / account mgmt)
Priority badge (low / normal / high / urgent) · Status: draft

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does direct navigation to firms list work vs post-processing redirect?')
sendPrompt('Why is the all-tickets master list read-only with no actions?')
sendPrompt('What is on the team list and user detail pages?')

svg.text: Click any node to explore that step
